## Project

Which project or file are you using?

## Printer

What printer are you using?

## Problem

Describe the print, fitment, or install issue.

## Files used

List the exact files used, including revision names if relevant.

## Material and settings

Include material, nozzle size, layer height, supports, or any other helpful print details.

## Photos

Add photos or screenshots if possible.
